description: Letter from Daniel b. ʿAzarya probably to Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq b. Furāt ha-Kohen. Efrayim b. Shemarya (fl. 1007–1055 CE) and the ḥaver ʿEli b. ʿAmram are mentioned. The sender gives the latter instructions in support of the ḥāver Yeshuʿa b. Yosef ha-Kohen of Alexandria. Reports on heavy taxation, especially in Damascus. In script and style identical to a Bodl. MS heb. a 3/17 (PGPID 6326). Dating: approximately 1055 CE (per Gil), but this estimate may be too late given that Efrayim b. Shemarya probably died during 1055 or shortly beforehand. If Daniel b. ʿAzarya was serving as Gaʾon (r. 1051–1062 CE) at the time when he sent this letter, then a plausible date range would be: 1051–1055 CE. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב מדניאל ב' עזריה כנראה לאברהם ב' יצחק ב' פורת הכהן. מזכיר את אפרים ב' שמריה ואת החבר עלי ב' עמרם. מדווח על מיסוי כבד, במיוחד בדמשק. כ-1051-1055.
